text.message: bro what is with this solo?

because Im going to get blocked by you all on a worse number anyways
so ill keep it for when I get inevitably soloed again

but you choose to solo the worst player
when red clearly has 3 devs in hand
trading oj 2 for 1 wood afert all those 6s
I dont understand any of you

well i dont have much else to do\
Ignore me, I just don't understand why everyone would solo, the worst off player 5 times
